pos.templateLoadError: Failed to load template. Set VITE_CENTRAL_SESSION_TOKEN for API access.
pos.templateMissing: No layout template selected. The fallback grid scans the configured demo barcode.
pos.checkoutDescription: Store Edge flow: operational day, shift, receipt, scan, mock payment, mock fiscal document.
pos.receiptDescription: Lines are locked after payment starts.
pos.openReceiptHint: Prepare the terminal, then start a new sale.
pos.paymentDescription: Capture cash or mock card payments. Use a smaller amount to test split payment.
pos.fiscalDescription: Available after the receipt is fully paid.
pos.scannerDescription: Enter a barcode or use a tile. Template tiles reuse the configured demo barcode in this slice.
pos.numpadDescription: Touch input placeholder for upcoming quantity and payment shortcuts.

status.notPrepared: Store Edge is not prepared yet.
status.saleFinished: Sale finished. Start the next receipt when ready.

errors.openReceiptFailed: Receipt was not opened. Check terminal readiness and Store Edge state.
errors.receiptNotEditable: Receipt lines can be changed only before payment starts.
errors.scanProductFailed: Product scan was rejected. Check the barcode and catalog state.
errors.positiveReceiptTotalRequired: Receipt total must be greater than zero.
errors.paymentAmountTooHigh: Payment amount cannot exceed the remaining amount.
errors.capturePaymentFailed: Payment was not captured. Check the payment state and try again.
errors.paymentAlreadySubmitted: Payment was already submitted for this receipt.
errors.fiscalAlreadySubmitted: Fiscalization was already submitted for this receipt.
errors.fiscalizationFailed: Fiscalization was rejected. Check receipt payment and device state.
